description: Create a physics simulation in GeoGebra comparing the trajectory of a baseball in a vacuum versus in air with drag (Fd = 0.5 * ρ * Cd * A * v²). Use the following parameters: Mass m = 0.145 kg, Drag Coefficient Cd = 0.30, Cross-sectional Area A = 0.0043 m², Air Density ρ = 1.225 kg/m², Initial Velocity v0 = 44.7 m/s, Launch Angle θ = 30°, and Gravity g = 9.8 m/s². The simulation must model both trajectories and identify the landing points (y=0) for each. Save the file as baseball_physics.ggb in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
